rules.planning-boundary: Ordinary safe, bounded work explicitly requested by the human is already authorized; use Planner, Opposition, and human discussion only for an escalation condition.
rules.plan-pause: For an escalated decision, present the Chair plan and pause for natural-language human discussion before execution.
rules.phase-handoff: Continue after phase results unless they introduce an escalation condition; only then use Project Manager, Opposition, Chair planning, and human discussion.
rules.parallel-execution: After direct authorization or escalation confirmation, run useful independent work in parallel; six is capacity, not a quota, and separable domains should not be overloaded into one child.
rules.complete-handoff: Every child prompt names exact working, input, and output paths with the complete task contract.
rules.result-inbox: Keep every complete result envelope and treat acknowledgement as delivery, not acceptance.
rules.recursive-cells: Use recursive Goal Cells without letting capability references grant permissions.
rules.program-boundary: Programs transport complete prompts and results but never interpret AI prose or enforce the planning sequence.
